+               blocks=4, layers=2,

     model = GWNet(num_nodes=207, in_dim=in_dim, out_dim=12,

@@ -99,9 +104,14 @@
     print(f'Params: {n_params/1e6:.2f}M')

 

     LR = float(os.environ.get('LR', '1e-3'))

-    opt = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=LR, weight_decay=1e-4)

-    EPOCHS = int(os.environ.get('EPOCHS', '60'))

-    sched = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.MultiStepLR(opt, milestones=[20, 40, 55], gamma=0.5)

+    WD = float(os.environ.get('WD', '1e-4'))

+    opt = torch.optim.Adam(model.parameters(), lr=LR, weight_decay=WD)

+    EPOCHS = int(os.environ.get('EPOCHS', '120'))

+    SCHED = os.environ.get('SCHED', 'cosine')

+    if SCHED == 'cosine':

+        sched = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(opt, T_max=EPOCHS, eta_min=1e-5)

+    else:

+        sched = torch.optim.lr_scheduler.MultiStepLR(opt, milestones=[30, 60, 90], gamma=0.5)

 

     best_val = float('inf')

     ckpt_dir = pathlib.Path('checkpoints')
